overview: SlimeMart is a premium all-in-one ecommerce platform featuring a hyper slime UI — neon green and purple gradients, glassmorphic cards, glowing borders, and fluid animations. Customers browse products, manage a cart, and check out, while merchants manage inventory, orders, and view analytics through a protected admin dashboard.
features: Product storefront with glassmorphic neon-glow cards
Shopping cart with real-time quantity updates
Full checkout flow with order confirmation
Admin dashboard with product CRUD and file uploads
Internet Identity login for customers and merchants
Hyper slime design system: neon gradients, blob shapes, glow effects, smooth animations
